message:
fix(reaper): batch Reap UPDATE to avoid blocking hq queries for 60-90s

The Reap function did a single bulk UPDATE on all matching wisps, which
held a write lock on hq.wisps (18K+ rows) for 60-90+ seconds, blocking
all concurrent reads including bd ready. Now uses SELECT...LIMIT + UPDATE
WHERE id IN (...) batches of 100 rows each, releasing the write lock
between batches so other queries can interleave. (gt-267a)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
